title: Lockheed Beats Families’ Birth Defects Suit At Trial | News | Greenberg Traurig LLP
content:
Francis A. Citera, Gretchen N. Miller, Irina Khasin, Ryan T. Hopper, David B. Weinstein, Christopher Torres, Raymond D. Jackson, Brian C. Porter, Jennifer M. Faggion, and Madeleine Voigt are mentioned in a Law360 article titled “Lockheed Beats Families’ Birth Defects Suit At Trial.”
